response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:04: Identified 'Slap by Step' (Japanese ver.) by Hololive Indonesia 2nd Generation. Composer: Ryosuke Goto. Found lyrics and English translation. 2. 02:04-02:27: Identified as an interlude/transition. 3. 02:27-05:00: Identified 'Fortune Spinner' by Hololive English -Myth-. Composer: Egawa Koutarou. Found lyrics. 4. Constructed the JSON object with identified song details and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video presents two vocal performances by Hololive production members, with an interlude in between. The first song, 'Slap by Step', is performed by the Hololive Indonesia 2nd Generation. The second song, 'Fortune Spinner', is performed by Hololive English -Myth-.

scenes.description: The performance of 'Slap by Step' by Hololive Indonesia 2nd Generation begins, with the members dancing and singing on stage. Text on screen indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
単純なphraseでcatchして
困難だらけの人生だけど
自由奔放にslapして楽しんじゃおう
ah oh ah oh
(fly like a feather soaring high！)
立ちはだかる壁なんて
3秒でknock out
(fly like a feather soaring high！)
止まらないんじゃなくて
止まれないんだ！
slap by stepで空中散歩私なりで
隙あらばその瞬間に完全掌握
沼にハマっちゃうぞ！
one two threeで深層心理crashして
ツマらない現実を
常識外れのrifleで撃ち抜いて！
ah 極彩色のdance floor
とんだ無礼ね平手打ちよ
子供扱いしないで
ニヤついた顔にslash it！
(clap your hands and stand up, please！)
首飛んじゃっても為せば成る
それがtheoryさ
(clap your hands and stand up, please！)
つべこべ言わず着いてきて
ready？ it’s time for the show
we’re ignited, and have no fear, ready to break through.
姿形は違っても同じ想いだ
そうだから…！
slap by stepで空中散歩私なりで
隙あらばその瞬間に完全掌握
沼にハマっちゃうぞ！
one two threeで深層心理crashして
今すぐね
私達の色に染め上げた世界を見せる！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
catch with a simple phrase
life is full of difficulties, but
let’s slap freely and enjoy it
ah oh ah oh
(fly like a feather soaring high！)
facing walls
knock them out in 3 seconds
(fly like a feather soaring high！)
it’s not that i won't stop
i can’t stop！
taking a stroll in the air step by step, in my own way
seizing the moment whenever there’s a chance
i’m going to get stuck in the swamp！
crash into deep psychological layers with one two three
shoot down the boring reality
with an unconventional rifle！
ah, a dance floor in vivid colors
what a cheeky move, a slap in the face
don’t treat me like a child
slash that smirking face！
(clap your hands and stand up, please！)
even if your head flies off, if you do it, it will happen
that’s the theory
(clap your hands and stand up, please！)
without complaining, come along
ready？ it’s time for the show
we’re ignited and have no fear, ready to break through.
even if our appearances are different, our feelings are the same
yes, that’s why…！
taking a stroll in the air step by step, in my own way
seizing the moment whenever there’s a chance
i’m going to get stuck in the swamp！
crash into deep psychological layers with one two three
right now
show the world we’ve dyed in our colors！
